subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Grandeur, throughout the nights and days, hath been engaged in the remembrance of the friends from among His male and female servants, to which every discerning one beareth witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان عظمت در لیالی و ایام بذکر دوستان از عباد و اماء مشغول یشهد بذلک کل ذی
